description: Import the State Plane coordinate survey from C:\workspace\data\state_plane_survey.xyz (space-delimited) into TopoCal. Translate the entire dataset so that Point 1 (Point ID: 1) is located at exactly X=1000.000, Y=1000.000, ensuring elevations remain unchanged. Rotate all points 14.5 degrees clockwise around Point 1. Export the resulting local coordinates to C:\workspace\data\local_architectural_grid.xyz and save the project file to C:\workspace\data\architectural_site.tcp.
